app.title: DownloadThat
app.tagline: ከአብዛኞቹ ድረ-ገጾች ሚዲያ አውርድ፣ በማንኛውም መሳሪያ ላይ

license.title: License
license.status_active: Pro active ({tier}). Thanks for your support!
license.status_invalid: Free — the saved key is invalid or expired.
license.status_device_limit: ነጻ — ይህ ፈቃድ በሌላ ተመሳሳይ ዓይነት መሣሪያ ላይ አስቀድሞ ንቁ ነው።

queue.title: Queue
queue.subtitle: Updates automatically.
queue.open_failed_toast: Couldn't open this file — try the link instead.
queue.open_unsupported_toast: Opening files only works in the Android app.
queue.open_folder_unsupported_toast: Opening folders only works in the Android app.
queue.share_unsupported_toast: Sharing only works in the Android app.

settings.title: Settings
settings.folder_not_supported: Only available in the Android app.

app.footer: DownloadThat — only download media you have the rights to.

batch.label: One link per line, or a single playlist link
batch.placeholder: Paste multiple links (one per line), or a single playlist link
batch.need_links_toast: Paste at least one link first.
batch.queue_failed_toast: Failed to queue one or more links.

terms.title: Before you start
terms.body: This app is a technical tool for downloading media from links you provide yourself. You are solely responsible for making sure you're allowed to download and use the content behind any link you enter — the developer takes no responsibility for what you download.
terms.checkbox_label: I've read and accept the terms of use, and I understand I'm solely responsible for the content I download.

about.title: About
about.licenses: Uses yt-dlp (Unlicense), FFmpeg & LAME (LGPL), Chaquopy (MIT), requests & Beautiful Soup (Apache-2.0/MIT), certifi (MPL-2.0), and AndroidX (Apache-2.0).

limit.title: የዕለት ገደብ ላይ ደርሷል
limit.body: የዛሬውን ነጻ ገደብ {limit} ውርዶች ተጠቅመዋል። ላልተገደበ ውርዶች ከታች የፈቃድ ቁልፍ ያስገቡ፣ ወይም ከ{hours} ሰዓት በኋላ እንደገና ይሞክሩ።

errors.network_offline: No internet connection. Check your connection and try again.
errors.geo_blocked: This video isn't available in your country.
errors.login_required: This video needs a login (it's private or age-restricted).
errors.rate_limited: The site asked us to slow down. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.video_unavailable: This video is no longer available.
errors.engine_outdated: The download engine needs an update for this site.
errors.disk_full: Your phone's storage is full. Free up some space and try again.
errors.stalled: The download stopped making progress and was aborted.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong with this download.

meta.title: DownloadThat — Video, Audio & Image Downloader for Android
meta.description: Download videos, audio and images straight to your Android phone. No Play Store, no ads, no lock-in. Free core, Pro from €1/month.

hero.eyebrow: Free core · No ads · No account needed
hero.lead: Video, audio and images from almost any site — downloaded straight to your Android phone. No cloud upload, no data ever leaves your device, no Play Store needed.

features.h2: Everything you need, nothing you don't
features.lead: A fast, private downloader that just works — with a Pro tier for anyone who wants more.
features.f1_desc: አገናኝ ለጥፍ፣ ጥራት ምረጥ፣ አውርድ። ከአብዛኞቹ ቪዲዮ፣ ኦዲዮ እና ምስል ድረ-ገጾች ጋር ይሰራል — እንደ Spotify ወይም Netflix ባሉ በ DRM የተጠበቁ አገልግሎቶች ጋር አይሰራም።
features.f2_desc: Scan a page for every media file and download them together, with pick/unpick.
features.f3_desc: Everything runs locally on your phone. Nothing gets uploaded to a server you don't control.
features.f4_desc: No ad networks, no analytics SDKs, no dark-pattern paywalls. Just the app.
features.f5_desc: Pull just the audio track out of any video and save it as MP3.
features.f6_desc: Install the Android version directly. No account, no Play Store review process, no region locks.

pricing.lead: Free forever: 3 download a day in full HD/4K quality. Unlimited with Pro.
pricing.consent_label: ግዢው እንደተጠናቀቀ ወዲያውኑ የመሰረዝ መብቴን እንደማጣ በመረዳት፣ በህግ የተደነገገው የ14 ቀናት የመሰረዝ ጊዜ ከማብቃቱ በፊት መዳረሻው ወዲያውኑ እንዲጀምር እጠይቃለሁ ({terms_start}የአጠቃቀም ውሎችን{terms_end} §6.3 እና {refund_start}የመሰረዝ ማስታወቂያን{refund_end} ይመልከቱ)። ከተነቃቃ በኋላ ራስ-ሰር ተመላሽ ገንዘብ የለም።

faq.q1_title: Do I need Pro to use the app?
faq.q1_body: No. The app is free and fully usable. Pro removes limits and supports development.
faq.q2_title: Does this work without Google Play?
faq.q2_body: Yes — it's a standalone Android version you install directly. No Play Store account or approval needed.
faq.q3_title: Where do I enter my license key?
faq.q3_body: Right after purchase you'll see your license key on the confirmation page — enter it in the app's settings.
faq.q4_body: ፍቃዱ ከነቃ በኋላ ራስ-ሰር ገንዘብ ተመላሽ የለም። እርግጠኛ ካልሆኑ፣ ግዢ የማያስፈልገውን ነጻ ስሪት ይጠቀሙ።
faq.q5_body: You're responsible for how you use downloaded content. Please respect copyright and the terms of the sites you download from.

success.title: Thank you — DownloadThat Pro
success.lead: Your license key is below — enter it in the app's settings.
success.error: We couldn't find your license yet. Please reload this page in a moment.
success.no_session: Session missing — please use the link from your purchase confirmation.
success.footer_note: This page automatically checks for a few seconds after payment. If nothing shows up, reload the page or email {support_email} with your payment confirmation.
success.duplicate_warning_title: Heads up — you already have an active subscription
success.duplicate_warning_body: We found {count} other active license(s) under this email address. If this purchase was accidental (e.g. a double-click), you can refund this one below.

refund.title: Withdrawal & refund
refund.body: Enter the license key and the email address from your purchase. If your purchase was made within the last 14 days, we'll refund it in full via Stripe and deactivate the license immediately — no reason needed.
refund.success: Refunded. The money will be back with your payment provider within a few business days, and the license has been deactivated.
refund.error_missing_fields: Please fill in both the license key and the email address.
refund.error_no_match: We couldn't find a purchase matching that license key and email address.
refund.error_already_canceled: This license has already been refunded or canceled.
refund.error_window_expired: The 14-day refund window for this purchase has ended. Contact support if you'd still like to discuss this.
refund.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
refund.error_payment_processing: This payment hasn't cleared yet (SEPA Direct Debit can take up to 14 business days). We've already canceled the subscription so it won't renew — please try this form again once the payment has gone through.
